title: Iran’s President Suggests Diplomatic Engagement Possible in Letter to U.S. Public
summary_full: The letter, by President Masoud Pezeshkian of Iran, was at times defiant, patronizing or conciliatory, and came hours before President Trump was set to address the American people on the war.
summary_public: The letter, by President Masoud Pezeshkian of Iran, was at times defiant, patronizing or conciliatory, and came hours before President Trump was set to address the American people on the war.

IR.label: neutral
